title: YOUEON 16 Pack Small Living Bud Vases 250ml Green Glass Vase Decorative Bottles Vintage Flower Bottle Centerpiece for Wedding Reception Home Decor Office Vintage Look
features: Bud Vases Bulk: YOUEON set of 16 green glass bud vases measures 13cm H x 6cm D, Our bud bottles have a thin neck and sturdy base to stand well and easily being held. Sufficient quantities are enough to meet your need.

Simple but Vintage Design: The curved neck of the glass bud vase widens to a 2 cm diameter bottle that's perfect for displaying artificial or cut flowers. With a simple, clear glass design, these light weight glass bottles make flower arranging fun and easy.

Thick and Sturdy Glass: Made of high-quality, lead-free glass, which is durable and not easily broken. Our vases for flowers are clear enough with a smooth, scratch-free surface that you can clearly see the individual stems vividly from clear vases. Feel the nature inside your home.

Wide Range of Uses: This glass vase set can be used for long-stemmed flowers or as centerpieces for home decorations, farmhouse home decor, table decor, wedding, party, hotel, restaurant, cafes. Perfect for enhancing the look of any dining table.

DIY Purpose: The glass vases for centerpieces can be filled with artificial flowers, pebbles, and candles, handcrafted arts, tied with rope or painted with colors for a unique DIY project. More DIY purposes wait for you to discover! They also make lovely gifts for friends or family！
